panels.title: Tokens per 1% Utilization (5-hour window)
panels.description: How many tokens correspond to 1% of your 5-hour plan budget. A stable line means your plan quota is consistent. A rising line means more tokens are needed per % point — could indicate caching improvements or quota changes. A dropping line means fewer tokens per % — heavier token types or quota reduction.

targets.rawSql: WITH hourly_tokens AS ( SELECT date_trunc('hour', m.timestamp) AS hour, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ), hourly_usage AS ( SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) AS hour, AVG(utilization_pct) AS avg_pct FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name = 'five_hour' AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT ht.hour AS time, CASE WHEN hu.avg_pct > 0 THEN ROUND(ht.tokens / hu.avg_pct) ELSE NULL END AS tokens_per_pct FROM hourly_tokens ht JOIN hourly_usage hu ON hu.hour = ht.hour ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tokens per 1% Utilization (7-day window)
panels.description: How many tokens correspond to 1% of your 7-day plan budget. More stable than the 5-hour view. Useful for detecting long-term quota changes or shifts in how different token types (input vs output vs cache) affect utilization.

targets.rawSql: WITH hourly_tokens AS ( SELECT date_trunc('hour', m.timestamp) AS hour, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ), hourly_usage AS ( SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) AS hour, AVG(utilization_pct) AS avg_pct FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name = 'seven_day' AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT ht.hour AS time, CASE WHEN hu.avg_pct > 0 THEN ROUND(ht.tokens / hu.avg_pct) ELSE NULL END AS tokens_per_pct FROM hourly_tokens ht JOIN hourly_usage hu ON hu.hour = ht.hour ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Token Consumption vs 5-hour Utilization
panels.description: Overlay of absolute token consumption (left axis) and 5-hour utilization % (right axis). Allows visual correlation — when tokens spike, does utilization spike proportionally? Divergence suggests different token types have different weight on the plan budget.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', m.timestamp) AS time, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) AS time, AVG(utilization_pct) AS utilization_pct FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name = 'five_hour' AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Token Consumption vs 7-day Utilization
panels.description: Overlay of absolute token consumption (left axis) and 7-day utilization % (right axis). The 7-day window smooths out short bursts. Useful for identifying sustained consumption patterns and their impact on plan budget.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', m.timestamp) AS time, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) AS time, AVG(utilization_pct) AS utilization_pct FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name = 'seven_day' AND timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Estimated 5h Budget (tokens)
panels.description: Estimated total token budget for the 5-hour window. Calculated as: total tokens consumed in period / average utilization %. Only accurate when utilization data is available.

targets.rawSql: WITH total_tokens AS ( SELECT SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 hours' ), current_pct AS ( SELECT utilization_pct FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name = 'five_hour' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT CASE WHEN cp.utilization_pct > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * tt.tokens / cp.utilization_pct) ELSE NULL END AS estimated_budget FROM total_tokens tt, current_pct cp

panels.title: Estimated 7d Budget (tokens)
panels.description: Estimated total token budget for the 7-day window. Calculated as: total tokens consumed in period / average utilization %. Gives a rough idea of your plan's total capacity.

targets.rawSql: WITH total_tokens AS ( SELECT SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ), current_pct AS ( SELECT utilization_pct FROM usage_snapshots WHERE window_name = 'seven_day' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT CASE WHEN cp.utilization_pct > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * tt.tokens / cp.utilization_pct) ELSE NULL END AS estimated_budget FROM total_tokens tt, current_pct cp
